name: wattpost-mobile
description: WattPost native mobile shell (Capacitor). A thin wrapper that loads the wattpost.cloud PWA in a WebView and adds native push (APNs/FCM), splash, and status-bar tinting. The web app itself lives in www/ (plain JS — no build step; webDir points straight at it).

scripts.build:android: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
